name: Walnut Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the softened butter, icing sugar, and vanilla until light and fluffy.
2. Gradually stir in the chopped walnuts until combined.
3. Pat the dough into a 9-inch pan with a removable bottom, creating 12 pie-shaped wedges by scoring with a fork.
4. Place one large walnut piece on each wedge.
5. Set the pan on a baking sheet and bake in an oven preheated to 325°F (163°C) for 40 minutes or until lightly browned.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
7. Cut into wedges.
8. Makes 12 servings.
9. Store in a tightly covered tin container.
From The Gazette, December 12, 1990.
